mapper.update:
update mlsd_mobile_product_presentation
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
new_products_img_url_1 = #{record.newProductsImgUrl1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
new_products_img_url_2 = #{record.newProductsImgUrl2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

product_list_img_url = #{record.productListImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update mlsd_mobile_product_presentation
id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
new_products_img_url_1 = #{newProductsImgUrl1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
new_products_img_url_2 = #{newProductsImgUrl2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select id , new_products_img_url_1 , new_products_img_url_2 , new_products_img_url_3 , new_products_img_url_4 , signature_cuisineimg_url_1 , signature_cuisineimg_url_2 , signature_cuisineimg_url_3 , signature_cuisineimg_url_4 , new_products_title_img_url , signature_cuisineimg_title_img_url , product_list_img_url from mlsd_mobile_product_presentation where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
